import React from 'react' import Pitsa from '../../assets/pitsa.png' import Riba from '../../assets/riba.png' import Krivetiki from '../../assets/krivetiki.png' import './cart.css' import '../../App.css' import { CiStar } from "react-icons/ci"; import { Button } from '../../style/Styled' const Cart = ({openModal}) => { const carts = [ { id: 1, image: Pitsa, title: "Onion Pizza", price: "$60.00", text: "Lorem, ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Repellendus, vel.", star: "5.0" }, { id: 2, image: Riba, title: "Mix Veg", price: "$20.00", text: "Lorem, ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Repellendus, vel.", star: "5.0" }, { id: 3, image: Krivetiki, title: "Mix Veg", price: "$20.00", text: "Lorem, ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Repellendus, vel.", star: "5.0" } ] return (
{carts.map((cart) => (
openModal(cart)}>

{cart.title}

{cart.price}

{cart.text}

{cart.star}

))}
) } export default Cart
